---
title: "Austin Lin"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: ../assets/about_page/AustinCoral.png
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/AustLin
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/austin-lin/
---

Systems & Mechanical Engineer with a passion for robotics, controls, and
building things end-to-end — from CAD and embedded firmware to autonomy and
interactive simulation.

## Skills

**Design & Mechanical:** SolidWorks, CAD, 3D printing, rapid prototyping
**Software:** Python, C/C++, MATLAB, OpenCV, Processing
**Robotics & Controls:** ROS2, LiDAR navigation, computer vision (YOLO), state estimation, embedded systems (Arduino)

## Education

**University of Maryland, College Park** | 2020 - 2024  
B.S. Mechanical Engineering  
*Minor in Robotics and Autonomous Systems*  
*Public Leadership Scholars Program*  

## Experience

**General Dynamics Electric Boat** | Systems Engineer  
*September 2024 - Present*

**L3Harris C5** | Systems Engineering Intern  
*June 2023 - August 2023*

**UMD Space Systems Laboratory** | Undergraduate Researcher  
*May 2022 - August 2022*  

---
<div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.8em; color:gray; margin-top:2em;">
This website is built with Quarto, and hosted on Github Pages.
</div>
